name: Hot Lettuce
recipeInstructions:
1. Break up the lettuce and onion and place in a serving bowl, set aside.
2. To make the dressing, cook the bacon until crispy, then drain and add to a pot of boiling water.
3. Mix together sugar, vinegar, flour, and egg in a separate bowl.
4. Pour the mixture into the pot with the cooked bacon and continue cooking until thickened.
5. Carefully pour the dressing over the lettuce while still hot, ensuring it is evenly coated.
6. Serve immediately.
